**Summary:**

- **13 ACs**, all verifiable by a blind QA agent using `ls`, `cat`, `jq`, `wc -l`, `npm run build`, `npx vitest run`, and file system inspection — no source code or internal data structure references

- **Scope**: upgrades `workflow-persistence.ts` and wires `workflow-runner.ts` — no machine file changes
- **Explicitly deferred**: resume from snapshot (26-2), checkpoint log (26-3), completion cleanup edge cases (26-4)
